profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Sriwahana Adityakarta Tbk manufactures and sells corrugated carton packaging solutions in Indonesia. It operates through Corrugated, Paper Tube, Paper Cone, and Paper Roll segments. The company offers corrugated carton sheets and boxes, paper cones, and paper tubes made from recycled paper. It also engages in industry and general trade activities. The company was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Boyolali, Indonesia. PT Sriwahana Adityakarta Tbk operates as a subsidiary of Pt Sumber Makmur Lumintu.
